function breakAddressLines(data) { var template = ""; if (data != null) { for (var i = 0; i < data.length; i++) { template = template + data[i] + "
"; } } return template; }

var inputChanged = false; var isExisting = true; var useAdvancedSearchOnRenewal = false; function reloadPage() { location.href = ElanMvc.settings.baseUrl + '/Circ/Batch/Edit/' + $('#BatchId').val(); } function reloadNewPage() { location.href = ElanMvc.settings.baseUrl + '/Circ/Batch/Edit'; } function onTabSelect(e) { if (e.item.innerText == "Subs in Batch") { $('#save-panel').hide(); } else { $('#save-panel').show(); } } function defaultComboBox(comboBox) { if (comboBox.value() && comboBox.selectedIndex == -1) { comboBox._filterSource({ value: "", field: comboBox.options.dataTextField, operator: "contains" }); comboBox.select(1); } } var enablePubDropdown = true; function onPublicationChange(e) { defaultComboBox(this); var publication = $("#InputData_PublicationId").data("kendoComboBox").dataItem(); //$('#PromotionCodeDisplay').val(''); var auditTypes = $("#InputData_AuditTypeId").data("kendoDropDownList"); if (publication != undefined) { $('#PublicationCodeDisplay').val(publication.Description); if ($("#InputData_PromotionId").val() == '') { $("#InputData_PromotionId").attr("disabled","disabled"); } if (publication.AuditedPublication) { //$('#audit-fields').show(); auditTypes.dataSource.filter({ field: "AuditType", value: publication.AuditType }); $('#InputData_AuditFileNumber').val(''); }else{ //$('#audit-fields').hide(); auditTypes.dataSource.filter([]); } } else { $('#PublicationCodeDisplay').val(""); $("#InputData_PromotionId").removeAttr("disabled"); auditTypes.dataSource.filter([]); } auditTypes.value(""); var publicationComboBox = $("#InputData_PublicationId").data("kendoComboBox"); publicationComboBox.enable(enablePubDropdown); } function onPublicationOpen(e) { var publicationList = $("#InputData_PublicationId").data("kendoComboBox").list; publicationList.width(350); } function onPromotionChange(e) { defaultComboBox(this); var promotion = $("#InputData_PromotionId").data("kendoComboBox").dataItem(); if (promotion != undefined) { $('#PromotionCodeDisplay').val(promotion.Name); var sourceCodeComboBox = $("#InputData_SourceCodeId").data("kendoComboBox"); sourceCodeComboBox.value(promotion.SourceCodeId); $('#SourceCodeDisplay').val(promotion.SourceCodeDescription); } else { } } function onPromotionSelected(id, promotion) { var box = this; var boxValue = box.input[0].value; if (promotion) { $('#PromotionCodeDisplay').val(promotion.PromotionName); var sourceCodeComboBox = $("#InputData_SourceCodeId").data("kendoComboBox"); sourceCodeComboBox.value(promotion.SourceCodeId); $('#SourceCodeDisplay').val(promotion.SourceCodeDescription); var publicationComboBox = $("#InputData_PublicationId").data("kendoComboBox"); publicationComboBox.value(promotion.PublicationID); enablePubDropdown = false; publicationComboBox.trigger("change"); $('#PublicationCodeDisplay').val(promotion.PublicationName); }else{ if (boxValue != '') { box.lookup(); }else{ clearOutPub(); } } } function onPromotionClear() { clearOutPub();
